tasks.name: Create PresentationData type definition
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript interface for presentation table row data to ensure type safety for widget props

constraints: Must extend/fit into existing DashboardData interface
Include id, title, presentation_type, updated_at fields
Match database table column types exactly
Limit to 5 presentations with hasMore flag

tasks.input_state: Dashboard types file exists with DashboardData interface; building_blocks_submissions table has id, title, presentation_type, updated_at columns
tasks.output_state: PresentationData type exported with id (string), title (string), presentation_type (string | null), updated_at (string), plus presentations array and hasMore flag in DashboardData
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PresentationData type exists with correct fields matching database schema
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q 'export type PresentationData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'presentations.*PresentationData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts

tasks.name: Create presentations-table-widget component with table structure
tasks.purpose: Build server component that displays presentations in full-width table with columns for Title, Type, Last Modified, and Actions

dependencies: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableHead, TableRow, TableCell from @kit/ui/table
constraints: Server component (no 'use client' directive)
Receives presentations array and hasMore boolean as props
Full-width card wrapper
Table with 4 columns: Title, Type, Last Modified, Actions
Title column: truncate at 40 chars with ellipsis
Type column: show presentation_type or '—' if null
Last Modified: show relative date (e.g., '2 days ago')
Actions: 'Edit Outline' button linking to /home/ai/canvas/[id]
Show 'View All Presentations' link if hasMore is true
Limit display to 5 rows

tasks.input_state: PresentationData type exists from T1; shadcn Table and Card components available
tasks.output_state: PresentationsTableWidget component exists with table structure, columns, and action links
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists with Card wrapper, Table with 4 columns, title truncation, Edit Outline links, and View All link
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/presentations-table-widget.tsx && grep -q 'PresentationData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/presentations-table-widget.tsx && grep -q 'Table' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/presentations-table-widget.tsx && grep -q 'Edit Outline' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/presentations-table-widget.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add date formatting utility for Last Modified column
tasks.purpose: Format updated_at timestamps as human-readable relative dates (e.g., '2 days ago', 'Just now')

constraints: Use native JavaScript date formatting (no external library)
Show relative time for recent dates (< 7 days): '2 hours ago', 'Yesterday'
Show formatted date for older dates: 'Jan 15, 2026'
Handle null/undefined updated_at gracefully with fallback '—'
Format should match platform conventions

tasks.input_state: Widget component exists from T2 with table structure, updated_at displayed as raw timestamp
tasks.output_state: Last Modified column displays formatted dates using relative time for recent updates and absolute dates for older ones
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Last Modified column shows human-readable dates like '2 days ago' or 'Jan 15, 2026' instead of ISO timestamps

tasks.name: Add empty state to presentations-table-widget
tasks.purpose: Handle case when user has no presentations with helpful CTA to create first presentation

checks.target: You haven't created any presentations yet

dependencies: Empty state pattern from other dashboard widgets
constraints: Show when presentations array is empty
Display 'You haven't created any presentations yet' message
Include 'Create Your First Presentation' button as CTA
Link button to /home/ai/blocks (building blocks form)
Use muted text color for secondary message
Center align content in empty state

tasks.input_state: Widget component exists from T2 without empty state handling
tasks.output_state: Widget component has conditional rendering for empty state with helpful message and CTA button
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget shows 'You haven't created any presentations yet' message when presentations array is empty, with button linking to /home/ai/blocks
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "haven't created any presentations" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/presentations-table-widget.tsx && grep -q 'Create Your First Presentation' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/presentations-table-widget.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Wire presentations-table-widget to dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Integrate widget into dashboard page layout at full-width position (row 3 of grid)

patterns.expected_action: renders in dashboard grid with presentations data from loader

constraints: Import PresentationsTableWidget from _components
Place in full-width row 3 of grid (spans both columns)
Pass presentations array and hasMore flag from loader as props
Grid slot should match layout from S1918.I1.F2 dashboard structure

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page has grid layout; widget component exists from T2/T3/T4; dashboard loader provides presentations data
tasks.output_state: Widget renders in dashboard page at full-width row 3 with loader data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PresentationsTableWidget imported and rendered in dashboard page.tsx at row 3, full-width position
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'import.*PresentationsTableWidget' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q '<PresentationsTableWidget' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck
